title: Compatibility Pilot Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2
display_title: Compatibility Pilot Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2
wikitext:
[]: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by rangure0412 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:24 pm One of the unanswered answers that I still have is about compatibility Pilot/Core. Evas in Rebuild have Souls? And this needed to have a link with the pilot? All because its unanswered how Mari uses unit 2 in the second movie.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:45 pm Considering that Shinji, Asuka, Rei and Kaworu also pilot multiple Evas each while noone else can, it's safe to say that the pilot is the deciding factor in NTE compared to the soul insude the Eva

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by writer » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:35 pm 01 still includes Yui, then Rei II. 02 includes the original Shinkinami. The others may not have souls, but there could be something special with their construction; I wouldn't know specifically what that could be. Perhaps Mari could use 02 because she has compatibility with the Princess, as she calls her. Perhaps it's just her experience with Eva in general that allows her to Eva-hop. She knows secret codes, who knows how deep her Eva knowledge goes.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Mon Aug 16, 2021 6:26 pm writer wrote: 01 still includes Yui, then Rei II. 02 includes the original Shinkinami. The others may not have souls, but there could be something special with their construction; I wouldn't know specifically what that could be. Perhaps Mari could use 02 because she has compatibility with the Princess, as she calls her. Perhaps it's just her experience with Eva in general that allows her to Eva-hop. She knows secret codes, who knows how deep her Eva knowledge goes.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by writer » Mon Aug 16, 2021 8:57 pm Very interesting. I think it's likely a combination, as you suggested. Raikyu wrote: Btw, if I'm not mistaken the original Shikinami's soul is inside Evangelion 13 (together with Kaworu) and not Unit-02

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Aug 16, 2021 9:16 pm Yeah, I'll add my hat to "Original Asuka is in Unit 02." I think Kaworu between her legs was visual short-hand to say he's over there, in Unit 13.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Mon Aug 16, 2021 10:24 pm I mentioned this on another thread, but the "core unit" (which is like an artificial core) is replaced whenever a different pilot needs to pilot an Eva. Watch the following two scenes for background: 1.0: When they scramble to modify Eva-01 for Rei to pilot 2.0: When Eva-02 goes into freezing, the dialogue between Ritsuko and Asuka Yui being inside Eva-01 is something that is needed to advance the plot and character arcs in NTE, but it's not a necessary condition for Shinji specifically (and no one else) to be able to pilot the Eva. There is a departure from the setting of NGE here.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by aboose » Mon Aug 16, 2021 11:58 pm writer wrote: Very interesting. I think it's likely a combination, as you suggested. Raikyu#929014 wrote: Btw, if I'm not mistaken the original Shikinami's soul is inside Evangelion 13 (together with Kaworu) and not Unit-02

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 5:20 am aboose wrote: This doesn't really make sense with the imagery -- Asuka original appears once Unit 13 makes contact with Unit 02, and Kaworu also appears behind her. It's heavily suggested that Asuka and Kaworu are being used as the dual pilots for Unit 13.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by aboose » Tue Aug 17, 2021 5:49 am Agreed with most of what you have said, though Gendo explicitly says he "predicts" Asuka will go angel berserk mode and then absorbs her purposefully, which implies he needs two angel souls in Unit 13 in order to do whatever he was planning to do. I think the explanation for Original Asuka's location of soul is really nebulous. I initially thought it was in Unit 02 because it just "feels right" but there is no explanation for why it would be. The the imagery we do see heavily implies she is in Unit 13 in that scene with Kaworu, and there is no real time where it could have gotten in there transferred from Unit 02 into 13 in anything we see on screen.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 6:11 am aboose wrote: Agreed with most of what you have said, though Gendo explicitly says he "predicts" Asuka will go angel berserk mode and then absorbs her purposefully, which implies he needs two angel souls in Unit 13 in order to do whatever he was planning to do.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by aboose » Tue Aug 17, 2021 6:21 am Konja7 wrote: I definitely think Original Asuka wasn't inside Eva-13 in Q.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Wed Aug 18, 2021 6:01 am Konja7 wrote: Regarding the Additional Impact, Gendo plans to use Eva-01 and Eva-13 with the Spear of Longinus and the Spear of Cassius. So, Gendo would need two souls, but one inside Eva-13 and another inside Eva-01.

[]: Re: Compatibility Pilot/Core in Rebuild Or How Mari used unit 2?             Quote Post by Belllerophon » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:50 am DantesInferno wrote: We can see both spears sinking into the Eva Imaginary's chest, and then it "awakening" and falling from the cross. But it's not entirely clear what the Evas (01 and 13) were needed for (unless I'm forgetting some scene)...
